chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-7184 of 2019 Sohail Nomani Versus Amjad Khan and others DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Priority 1. For orders on Misc. No.26001/2023 (U/A) 2. For orders on Misc. No.26002/2023 (U/O-23). 3. For orders on office objections. 4. For hearing of Misc. No.31776/2022. 5. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 22.11.2023 Mr. Rajendar Kumar, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Asghar Bangush, Advocate for respondents No.1 to 3. Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. 1) Urgency granted. 2) This is an application for an unconditional withdrawal of this petition, which is not opposed. The application is allowed and the petition is dismissed as not pressed/withdrawn along with pending application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
